surfaces.import_detail: native typed Psionic state-dict ownership is the canonical import surface
surfaces.export_detail: native typed Psionic state-dict ownership is the canonical export surface
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: Psionic-native state dicts roundtrip without format conversion

surfaces.import_detail: supported for dense `f32` safetensors artifacts that carry the embedded Psionic manifest
surfaces.export_detail: supported for dense `f32` contiguous state dicts with embedded Psionic manifest metadata
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: dense `f32` manifest-carrying safetensors can roundtrip through the portable bundle

surfaces.import_detail: supported as a typed JSON state-dict compatibility shell rather than Python pickle
surfaces.export_detail: supported as a typed JSON state-dict compatibility shell rather than Python pickle
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: typed JSON compatibility artifacts can roundtrip through the portable bundle

surfaces.import_detail: supported through the explicit GGUF import path into portable Psionic state
surfaces.export_detail: GGUF export is intentionally unsupported in the current boundary
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: GGUF roundtrip is unsupported because export is intentionally absent

surfaces.import_detail: opaque Python pickle or `.pt` checkpoint decoding is intentionally unsupported
surfaces.export_detail: Psionic does not emit opaque Python pickle checkpoints
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: opaque Python pickle roundtrip is intentionally unsupported

surfaces.import_detail: legacy opaque checkpoint archives are outside the current bounded compatibility contract
surfaces.export_detail: legacy opaque checkpoint archives are not a Psionic export target
surfaces.roundtrip_detail: legacy opaque checkpoint roundtrip is intentionally unsupported
